title: UiPath For Coding Agents Prompts Fresh Look At UiPath (PATH) Valuation And Undervaluation Debate
text: UiPath's launch of coding agent capabilities has prompted fresh analysis of valuation and growth prospects. Company introduced UiPath for Coding Agents, an industry-first integration making popular AI coding agents deployable, orchestrated, and governed inside enterprise automation workflows. This expansion into AI coding agents opens new market opportunities and strengthens positioning against competitors. Recent financial performance shows UiPath delivering strong execution with revenue growth and margin expansion. Quarterly results demonstrate cash generation capability with operating cash flow and free cash flow reaching significant levels. Gross margins above 80% and strong balance sheet provide financial flexibility for investment and strategic initiatives. Analyst perspectives vary on valuation, with some seeing undervaluation opportunity given growth prospects and AI momentum, while others remain cautious on earnings trajectory. The introduction of coding agent capabilities represents significant product innovation that could accelerate adoption among enterprises seeking comprehensive automation platforms.
